name: claude-windows
description: Grid manager for Claude Code sessions — many sessions in a configurable grid, glow when a session is waiting on you, resume the whole layout after a restart.

scripts.test: node test/hooks.cjs && node test/smoke.mjs && node test/grid.mjs && node test/signal.mjs && node test/glow.mjs && node test/persist.mjs && node test/settings.mjs
